name: ValidateAccountType
businessLogic: If featureType is not 'TDAccountPreClosure', skip validation and return.
Retrieve ReferenceContractDTO from SlotsDTO using REFERENCE_CONTRACT_PARAMS key.
If ReferenceContractDTO is null, throw FbpValidationException with error CONTRACT_DETAILS_DO_NOT_EXIST_FOR_THE_GIVEN_PRODUCT.
Extract maturityDate from ReferenceContractDTO; determine isTDAccount as true if maturityDate is non-null and non-empty.
If isTDAccount is false, throw FbpValidationException with error ONLY_TIME_DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE_ALLOWED.
Log successful account type validation for the given feature type.
